name: universal-book-scraper
description: Configurable Chrome Extension for scraping book content to Markdown

scripts.build: esbuild src/content.js --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js && esbuild src/background.js --bundle --outfile=dist/background.js && esbuild src/popup.js --bundle --outfile=dist/popup.js
scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const p=path.join('node_modules','turndown','lib','turndown.browser.umd.js');const out=path.join('src','vendor','turndown.js');if(fs.existsSync(p)){fs.mkdirSync(path.join('src','vendor'),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(p,out);console.log('Copied turndown.js to src/vendor/');}else{console.warn('Turndown not found at '+p);}"
